server.name: sage-kernel
server.description: MCP control surface for Sage Kernel OS.

tools.name: kernel.phase.status
tools.description: List kernel phase status.

tools.name: kernel.catalog.search
tools.description: Search repos, modules, templates, integrations, and phases.

tools.name: kernel.template.list
tools.description: List available project templates and QA profile mappings.

tools.name: kernel.project.plan
tools.description: Create a project plan from a template, deployment target, QA profile, and infra profile.

tools.name: kernel.project.scaffold
tools.description: Scaffold a local project skeleton from a kernel template.

tools.name: kernel.warehouse.summary
tools.description: Summarize the connected AI Warehouse inventory.

tools.name: kernel.warehouse.search
tools.description: Search the AI Warehouse index for tools, categories, tags, and verdicts.

tools.name: kernel.qa.profile
tools.description: Return the QA profile for a template.

tools.name: kernel.qa.plan
tools.description: Plan QA gates for a template without executing them.

tools.name: kernel.qa.run
tools.description: Run safe local QA for the kernel or a generated project.

tools.name: kernel.repo.inspect
tools.description: Inspect a cataloged source repo without mutating it.

tools.name: kernel.infra.plan
tools.description: Return an infrastructure plan for a template and deploy target.

tools.name: kernel.deploy.prepare
tools.description: Prepare a deploy readiness plan with QA, infra, env, rollback, and approval gates.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.list
tools.description: List local safe jobs and approval boundaries.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.run
tools.description: Run a local safe job and write run history.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.runs
tools.description: List recent local job runs.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.enqueue
tools.description: Enqueue a durable local job in SQLite.

tools.name: kernel.worker.tick
tools.description: Run one durable worker queue tick.
tools.sideEffects: runs one local queued job if ready

tools.name: kernel.approvals.request
tools.description: Record an approval request in the local approval ledger.

tools.name: kernel.approvals.list
tools.description: List approval ledger entries.

tools.name: kernel.approvals.approve
tools.description: Approve and sign a pending approval request in the local approval ledger.
tools.sideEffects: writes signed local SQLite approval state

tools.name: kernel.dashboard.snapshot
tools.description: Return DB-backed dashboard state for the live command center.

tools.name: kernel.dogfood.prod
tools.description: Audit three production repos against kernel QA readiness without mutating them.
